doc: Voice patch for strum-harp.json (ADR-0032). One monophonic plucked saw voice: a held freq drives the oscillator, a held gate the percussive ADSR (near-instant attack, short decay, long release — each pluck rings out). NO filter here — the brightness Good Button drives a single master filter on the summed mix (host post-mix), so the voice is just osc -> env VCA. interface: freq/gate in, audio/active out.

nodes.doc: Percussive pluck: near-instant attack, short decay, no sustain — each pluck rings out on its own. Gated by the voicer; the strum op's paired note-off frees the voice.
Shape the linear envelope CV into an exponential-style volume curve (x^2).
